# AgentUtils

> Multi-tenant, agent-native infrastructure. KV, audit, DLQ, scheduler, HitL. https://agentutils.dev

The current API is **v2** under `/v1/*` — tenant-isolated, callback-signed, idempotent.

**Read the full reference: [llms-v2.txt](./llms-v2.txt)**

The previous single-tenant `/api/*` surface has been removed.
